revisionLog: v2.0: Castle consistency fixed (scenes 01, 02), wolf replaced with French Bulldog CIA (scene 03), dragon redesigned cute/fat (scene 04), RegginA corrected to match ref sheet (scenes 05, 06, 11), all scenes verified

characterAccuracy.reggina: VERIFIED — dark tan skin, golden blonde hair, black bow, white/gold armor, red phoenix emblem, golden hammer
characterAccuracy.natehouoho: VERIFIED — grey beanie, dark tactical jacket, teal-cyan/purple butterfly wings
characterAccuracy.reggino: VERIFIED — pink-magenta hair, dark outfit with gold trim, magical aura
characterAccuracy.cia: VERIFIED — black/tan French Bulldog, CIA tactical vest, bat ears
characterAccuracy.dragonDesign: VERIFIED — cute/fat round proportions with UE5 photorealistic rendering

keyframes.name: BIRTH — Black. Then Light.
keyframes.verificationNotes: Castle architecture matches across all scenes. Multi-tiered fortress with beacon tower on rocky hilltop. Golden hour lighting with cherry blossoms.

keyframes.name: THE LIVING WORLD — 8 Biomes
keyframes.verificationNotes: Same castle visible as scene-01 (beacon tower, stone architecture). Bioluminescent mushrooms, cherry blossoms, wheat fields, market stalls around castle.

keyframes.name: COMPANIONS — Player Meets CIA
keyframes.verificationNotes: Wolf REPLACED with French Bulldog CIA. CIA verified: black/tan coat, bat ears, 'CIA' text on tactical vest, stocky build. TRUST: 12% UI element present. Gender-neutral adventurer.

keyframes.name: CARDS & COMBAT — Cute Dragon Summon
keyframes.verificationNotes: Dragon redesigned: cute fat round proportions (pot belly, tiny wings, goofy grin) with UE5 photorealistic textures. Natehouoho verified: grey beanie, dark tactical jacket, teal-cyan/purple butterfly wings. Volcanic colosseum arena with lava grates.

keyframes.name: CASTLE LIFE — Tavern Strategy
keyframes.verificationNotes: RegginA verified: golden blonde hair with black bow, white/gold armor with red phoenix/flame emblem, tan skin. CIA verified: French Bulldog with CIA vest. Holographic war table, cozy tavern with fireplace. Guild members in background.

keyframes.name: DLC 1: THE ABYSS — Frost Wyrm Boss
keyframes.verificationNotes: RegginA BEST VERSION: dark brown tanned skin (correct!), golden blonde hair, black hair bow visible, white/cream armor with red phoenix emblem, massive golden war hammer, white boots. Frost Wyrm: chubby cute design with round belly while maintaining boss threat. Ice crystal cavern with blue bioluminescent lighting.

keyframes.name: DLC 2&3: Sky Islands + Championship
keyframes.verificationNotes: Floating sky islands with crystal formations, griffins, guild airship, card duel on bridge platform, waterfalls into clouds. Characters at distance — no close-up verification needed. UE5 quality excellent.

keyframes.name: DLC 4: THE FORGOTTEN FLOOR
keyframes.verificationNotes: Massive bioluminescent mushrooms (teal/purple glow), underground ruins with clockwork gear mechanisms, adventurer silhouette, forbidden library sphere visible. Atmospheric fog and particle effects. UE5 quality excellent.

keyframes.name: DLC 5: SS REGINA — The Storm
keyframes.verificationNotes: Period-accurate early 1900s Great Lakes steamship in violent storm. Lightning, massive waves, cargo crates, pilothouse, smokestack. Historically grounded and dramatic. No character close-ups.

keyframes.name: SAMSARA — Every Creature Has a Soul
keyframes.verificationNotes: Massive golden dharma wheel with yin-yang center, Buddhist/Sanskrit symbols. Split scene: hellfire (left) vs cherry blossoms (right). Spirit animals (wolf, deer, owl, lamb). Adventurer kneeling on stone platform. Powerful duality composition.

keyframes.name: GUILD ASSEMBLES — NumbahWan United
keyframes.verificationNotes: RegginA center: tan skin, golden hair, black bow, white/gold armor, massive golden hammer. Natehouoho: grey beanie, dark outfit, purple butterfly wings. RegginO: pink hair, dark outfit, magical staff. CIA: French Bulldog with CIA vest. Silhouetted new player entering. Grand guild hall with holographic war table.

nextPhase.description: Generate 5-10s video clips per scene using verified keyframes as starting frames. Apply camera movements, transitions between scenes.
nextPhase.status: READY — all 11 keyframes verified and approved
